task: Find technical specs for the latest Macbook Air on Apple.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated from apple.com to the MacBook Air product page and then to the official Apple Tech Specs page at https://www.apple.com/macbook-air/specs/. The page title explicitly shows 'MacBook Air - Tech Specs - Apple' and the content shows 'MacBook Air Technical Specifications' with 13-inch and 15-inch tabs. The homepage and product page identify the latest MacBook Air as 'Now supercharged by M5.' The final response includes the correct specs page URL and a reasonable summary of key specs visible on the page (chip, memory, storage, display, battery, ports, wireless, camera, weight). Minor simplifications in the summary do not negate completion.
final_result_response:
I found it. The latest MacBook Air on Apple is the **MacBook Air with M5**, and its technical specs page is:

https://www.apple.com/macbook-air/specs/

Key specs:

| Spec | 13-inch MacBook Air | 15-inch MacBook Air |
|---|---:|---:|
| Chip | Apple M5, 10-core CPU, 8-core or 10-core GPU | Apple M5, 10-core CPU, 10-core GPU |
| Memory | 16GB or 24GB unified, configurable up to 32GB | 16GB or 24GB unified, configurable up to 32GB |
| Storage | 512GB or 1TB SSD, configurable up to 4TB | 512GB or 1TB SSD, configurable up to 4TB |
| Display | 13.6-inch Liquid Retina, 2560 x 1664 | 15.3-inch Liquid Retina, 2880 x 1864 |
| Brightness | 500 nits | 500 nits |
| Battery | Up to 18 hrs video streaming, 15 hrs web | Up to 18 hrs video streaming, 15 hrs web |
| Ports | MagSafe 3, 2x Thunderbolt 4 USB-C, headphone jack | Same |
| Wireless | Wi‑Fi 7, Bluetooth 6, Thread | Same |
| Camera | 12MP Center Stage, 1080p video | Same |
| Weight | 2.7 lb | 3.3 lb |
action_history: Opening Apple website: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.apple.com/');
Opening MacBook Air details: await page.locator('e29').click();
Opening MacBook Air technical specs: await page.locator('e31').click();
